headline: Workday Integrations Aim To Deepen Role In Daily Workforce Communications
summary: Workday (NasdaqGS:WDAY) has introduced new integrations with Achievers for AI-powered employee recognition directly inside its Human Capital Management platform. The company also launched an Exclaimer integration that uses Workday HR data to standardize email signatures and meeting branding across an organization. These updates expand Workday's role at the center of HR and IT workflows, connecting people data with day to day employee and customer interactions. Workday enters these product...
